name: Recovery from empty post-tool turn
description: Asserts the model produces text after a tool call. This is the PR #54 / issue #40 regression class — the gemini-3-flash-preview thought-only STOP failure mode. Detection method differs from the other cases: instead of comparing tool trajectories we lean on `final_response_match_v2` to assert that the assistant's last message contains a substantive reply (not the empty/whitespace turn that the chat-handler's recovery stub would mask in production). If the model emits no text post-tool, this case fails LOUDLY and points at exactly the regression we just shipped.

parts.text: I started running again last week.
Nice — even one consistent week is the part that compounds. How's the body feeling so far?
